title: Kyo's Fried Eggs
description: A basic mod that adds fried eggs to minecraft
body:
This is a very simple mod that adds the fallowing items:

**Fried Eggs using chicken, turtle, sniffer, and ender dragon eggs**

These are used as a new and fun food scource

**Golden Fried Eggs**

These are basically a ripoff of golden carrots from the base game

**Enchanted Fried Golden Eggs**

Basically a ripoff of golden apples, they are more made with pvp in mind
